title: How to Create a Client Pitch With AI — From Prompt to PDF in 15 Minutes
summary: A video demonstration of Venngage AI's one-pager generator, which creates client-ready marketing documents from a single prompt. The workflow covers content generation, design, image selection, editing, and PDF export in approximately 15 minutes.
writeup: This video demonstrates Venngage AI's one-pager generator, which produces client-ready marketing documents from a single prompt. The workflow runs from content generation through design, image selection, editing, and PDF export in roughly 15 minutes. It shows how a structured pitch document can be assembled end to end without manual layout work.
